Technology Leadership & Board Governance

"Understanding how systems work at their most fundamental level has shaped every leadership role since."

Lakecia Gunter — 25 years from the Department of Defense to Microsoft CTO to boardrooms.

Scroll gently ↓

The Foundation

I began as a digital logic designer and program manager at the Department of Defense. That work — understanding systems at their most fundamental level — has shaped every leadership role since.

From DoD to Intel, where I served as Chief of Staff to the CEO. Then to Microsoft, where as CTO for Global Partner Solutions I led multi-billion-dollar platforms and global partner ecosystems. Each step built on the last.

"I'm known for helping executive teams and boards translate complex technology into clear strategic choices, particularly during periods of disruption, reinvention, and market transition."
— On her approach to advisory work
◆

IDEX Corporation

Independent Director, NYSE-listed industrial company

◇

Responsive.io

Board Advisor, private-equity-backed software

◆

TechArena.ai

Co-Founding Advisor, technology-driven change

◇

ROAR Podcast

Founder & Host, candid leadership conversations

Today

My perspective is grounded in enterprise stewardship, long-term value creation, and effective governance. I work with a limited number of leadership teams and boards each quarter — those who are serious about results, not headlines.

If you're navigating a technology transition and need perspective from someone who's operated at scale, let's talk.

Advisory & Board Inquiries

I take a limited number of engagements each quarter
